record_id.description: Unique identifier for the training record.

worker_id.description: Unique identifier for the worker who received training.

psm_elements_covered.description: List of PSM element names covered during this training session.

trainer_id.description: Unique identifier for the trainer who delivered the session.

completion_status.description: Overall completion status for the training session.

test_score.description: Competency assessment score as a percentage.

retraining_due_date.description: Date by which refresher or retraining must be completed (3-year cycle or earlier if triggered).

acknowledgment_signature.description: Worker's signed acknowledgment of participation and understanding (name or digital signature reference).
